MaxLineLength:FootprintsComponents.kt$color = if (selected) Color.White.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.strong) else TextGray.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.visible)
MaxLineLength:FootprintsHeroCard.kt$internal
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$ListCard(footprint = footprint, dayFormat = { DateUtils.formatMonthDayChineseFull(it) }, eventTypes = eventTypes, onClick = { onFootprintClick(footprint) })

MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$Text(text = text, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, color = textColor, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$Triple(baseColor, baseColor.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.subtle), customType.icon?.let { getGenericIcon(it) } ?: Icons.Default.Event)
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$internal
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$val customType = if (eventType.isNotBlank()) eventTypes.find { it.key == eventType } ?: eventTypes.find { it.name == eventType } else null
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$val eventTypeDisplayName = customType?.name ?: EventType.entries.find { it.name == footprint.eventType }?.displayName ?: footprint.eventType
MaxLineLength:FootprintsScreen.kt$HeroCard(footprint = latest, eventTypes = uiState.eventTypes, onClick = { navController.navigate(EventDetailRoute(latest.id)) })
MaxLineLength:FootprintsTimeline.kt$internal
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumComponents.kt$color = if (selectedContactId == contact.id) SignalPurple.copy(alpha = 0.1f) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumViewer.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.AccessTime, contentDescription = null, tint = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.6f), modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp))
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumViewer.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Place, contentDescription = null, tint = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.6f), modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp))
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumViewer.kt$val prevDist = (changes[i].previousPosition - changes[j].previousPosition).getDistance()
MaxLineLength:TabTreeContent.kt$Text(fav.title, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 10.sp, color = TermHighlight, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDetailDialog.kt$border = androidx.compose.foundation.BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half))
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Close, contentDescription = "清除", modifier = Modifier.size(12.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Close, contentDescription = "移除", modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$color = if (isPrivate) SignalAmber.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.faint) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$color = if (isTodo) SignalGreen.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.faint) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$if (isPrivate) SignalAmber.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.subtle) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$if (isTodo) SignalGreen.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.subtle) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)

MaxLineLength:ThoughtLevelBanner.kt$"EXP ${uiState.gamification?.currentExp ?: 0}/${uiState.gamification?.expForNextLevel ?: 0} · 距离 Lv.${uiState.gamification?.nextLevel ?: 2} 还需 ${uiState.gamification?.expToNextLevel ?: 0} EXP"
